programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: When Bert asks Sheldon to collaborate on a project with him, Sheldon becomes worried about others finding out because he thinks geology is beneath him. Raj seeks advice after reconnecting with Ruchi.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon tries to teach the other guys a lesson after they cut him out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment seven years ago.

programs.title: Becker
programs.desc: It's Thanksgiving, and Chris talks John into having a holiday dinner - just the two of them, but it soon turns into a much bigger, family affair.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier takes a date to Bora Bora and runs into someone unexpected.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier  bumps into  Lilith  and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.
